treatment_information.dosage_or_details: bi-nostril, 2 surgeon technique using a 0 degree and a 30 degree, 4mm sinus endoscope
treatment_information.treatment_response: resolution of the CSF rhinorrhea, no residual nasopharyngeal mass at seven months follow-up
continued to have CSF rhinorrhoea following the procedure

treatment_timeline.event: transcranial surgery performed to occlude the sellar opening
endoscopic endonasal repair performed to excise the PCC and the meningoencephalocele, and to repair the resulting skull base defect
post-operative course was uneventful with resolution of the CSF rhinorrhea
MRI showed no residual nasopharyngeal mass

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: MRI at seven months follow-up showed no residual nasopharyngeal mass
